Sentence audio at approval; remove word TTS from /generate

remaining_tasks.name: GET /users/me endpoint + wire real user name into Home screen

human_actions_pending.action: Device test: add a word, verify sentence audio plays on review front and reveal
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 1.2 implemented and committed but not tested on physical device

decisions.decision: Sentence is the card's only audio asset — plays on both review front and reveal
decisions.rationale: Ear-training focus; test = recall the i+1 unknown from sentence context, not isolated word

decisions.decision: onSave(sentence: string) API on ReviewStep threads final sentence text to TTS
decisions.rationale: Ensures ADD-03 inline edits reach the API instead of being captured by stale parent closure

decisions.decision: Sentence mode pre-populates selectedSentence on generation success
decisions.rationale: Eliminates || candidates[0] fallback in approveMutation; state always holds the real value

next_action: Implement GET /users/me backend endpoint returning display name, then wire into Home screen to replace hardcoded 'Léo'
context_notes: Plan 1.3 is the last item to close out Phase 1. The users table likely has a name field; check the schema. The Home screen currently hardcodes 'Léo' — find it and replace with a useQuery call to /users/me.
